component.author: Julio Beltran Ortega <jubeormk1@gmail.com>, Anthony Tambasco <anthony.github@fastmail.com>, Roman Valls Guimera <brainstorm@nopcode.org>
component.name: ssh-stamp
sunset-async
component.description: Async for Sunset SSH

component.name: sunset-sshwire-derive
component.description: Derive macros for Sunset SSH packet encoder/decoder

component.name: sunset
component.description: A SSH library suitable for embedded and larger programs

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: aes
component.description: Pure Rust implementation of the Advanced Encryption Standard (a.k.a. Rijndael)

component.author: Zakarum <zaq.dev@icloud.com>
component.name: allocator-api2
component.description: Mirror of Rust's allocator API

component.name: anstream
component.description: IO stream adapters for writing colored text that will gracefully degrade according to your terminal's capabilities.

component.name: anstyle-parse
component.description: Parse ANSI Style Escapes

component.name: anstyle-query
component.description: Look up colored console capabilities

component.name: anstyle
component.description: ANSI text styling

component.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: anyhow
component.description: Flexible concrete Error type built on std::error::Error

component.author: Thomas Bahn <thomas@thomas-bahn.net>, Torbjørn Birch Moltu <t.b.moltu@lyse.net>, Simon Sapin <simon.sapin@exyr.org>
component.name: ascii
component.description: ASCII-only equivalents to `char`, `str` and `String`.

component.author: Josh Stone <cuviper@gmail.com>
component.name: autocfg
component.description: Automatic cfg for Rust compiler features

component.author: Alice Maz <alice@alicemaz.com>, Marshall Pierce <marshall@mpierce.org>
component.name: base64
component.description: encodes and decodes base64 as bytes or utf8

component.author: Marshall Pierce <marshall@mpierce.org>
component.name: base64
component.description: encodes and decodes base64 as bytes or utf8

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: base64ct
component.description: Pure Rust implementation of Base64 (RFC 4648) which avoids any usages of data-dependent branches/LUTs and thereby provides portable "best effort" constant-time operation and embedded-friendly no_std support

component.author: Vincent Prouillet <hello@prouilletvincent.com>
component.name: bcrypt
component.description: Easily hash and verify passwords using bcrypt

component.author: Loïc Damien <loic.damien@dzamlo.ch>
component.name: bitfield-macros
component.description: Internal crate for the bitfield crate.

component.author: Loïc Damien <loic.damien@dzamlo.ch>
component.name: bitfield
component.description: This crate provides macros to generate bitfield-like struct.

component.author: The Rust Project Developers
component.name: bitflags
component.description: A macro to generate structures which behave like bitflags.

component.author: The Rust Project Developers
component.name: bitflags
component.description: A macro to generate structures which behave like bitflags.

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: block-buffer
component.description: Buffer type for block processing of data

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: blowfish
component.description: Blowfish block cipher

component.author: Lokathor <zefria@gmail.com>
component.name: bytemuck
component.description: A crate for mucking around with piles of bytes.

component.author: Andrew Gallant <jamslam@gmail.com>
component.name: byteorder
component.description: Library for reading/writing numbers in big-endian and little-endian.

component.author: Alex Crichton <alex@alexcrichton.com>
component.name: cfg-if
component.description: A macro to ergonomically define an item depending on a large number of #[cfg] parameters. Structured like an if-else chain, the first matching branch is the item that gets emitted.

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: chacha20
component.description: The ChaCha20 stream cipher (RFC 8439) implemented in pure Rust using traits from the RustCrypto `cipher` crate, with optional architecture-specific hardware acceleration (AVX2, SSE2). Additionally provides the ChaCha8, ChaCha12, XChaCha20, XChaCha12 and XChaCha8 stream ciphers, and also optional rand_core-compatible RNGs based on those ciphers.

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: cipher
component.description: Traits for describing block ciphers and stream ciphers

component.name: clap
component.description: A simple to use, efficient, and full-featured Command Line Argument Parser

component.name: clap_builder
component.description: A simple to use, efficient, and full-featured Command Line Argument Parser

component.name: clap_lex
component.description: Minimal, flexible command line parser

component.name: colorchoice
component.description: Global override of color control

component.author: AerialX
component.name: const-default
component.description: A const Default trait

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: cpufeatures
component.description: Lightweight runtime CPU feature detection for aarch64, loongarch64, and x86/x86_64 targets, with no_std support and support for mobile targets including Android and iOS

component.name: critical-section
component.description: Cross-platform critical section

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: crypto-common
component.description: Common cryptographic traits

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: ctr
component.description: CTR block modes of operation

component.name: curve25519-dalek-derive
component.description: curve25519-dalek Derives

component.author: Isis Lovecruft <isis@patternsinthevoid.net>, Henry de Valence <hdevalence@hdevalence.ca>
component.name: curve25519-dalek
component.description: A pure-Rust implementation of group operations on ristretto255 and Curve25519

component.author: Ted Driggs <ted.driggs@outlook.com>
component.name: darling
component.description: A proc-macro library for reading attributes into structs when implementing custom derives.

component.author: Ted Driggs <ted.driggs@outlook.com>
component.name: darling
component.description: A proc-macro library for reading attributes into structs when implementing custom derives.

component.author: Ted Driggs <ted.driggs@outlook.com>
component.name: darling
component.description: A proc-macro library for reading attributes into structs when implementing custom derives.

component.author: Ted Driggs <ted.driggs@outlook.com>
component.name: darling_core
component.description: Helper crate for proc-macro library for reading attributes into structs when implementing custom derives. Use https://crates.io/crates/darling in your code.

component.author: Ted Driggs <ted.driggs@outlook.com>
component.name: darling_core
component.description: Helper crate for proc-macro library for reading attributes into structs when implementing custom derives. Use https://crates.io/crates/darling in your code.

component.author: Ted Driggs <ted.driggs@outlook.com>
component.name: darling_core
component.description: Helper crate for proc-macro library for reading attributes into structs when implementing custom derives. Use https://crates.io/crates/darling in your code.

component.author: Ted Driggs <ted.driggs@outlook.com>
component.name: darling_macro
component.description: Internal support for a proc-macro library for reading attributes into structs when implementing custom derives. Use https://crates.io/crates/darling in your code.

component.author: Ted Driggs <ted.driggs@outlook.com>
component.name: darling_macro
component.description: Internal support for a proc-macro library for reading attributes into structs when implementing custom derives. Use https://crates.io/crates/darling in your code.

component.author: Ted Driggs <ted.driggs@outlook.com>
component.name: darling_macro
component.description: Internal support for a proc-macro library for reading attributes into structs when implementing custom derives. Use https://crates.io/crates/darling in your code.

component.author: Godfrey Chan <godfreykfc@gmail.com>, Jakub Beránek <berykubik@gmail.com>
component.name: delegate
component.description: Method delegation with less boilerplate

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: digest
component.description: Traits for cryptographic hash functions and message authentication codes

component.author: Slint Developers <info@slint.dev>
component.name: document-features
component.description: Extract documentation for the feature flags from comments in Cargo.toml

component.author: isis lovecruft <isis@patternsinthevoid.net>, Tony Arcieri <bascule@gmail.com>, Michael Rosenberg <michael@mrosenberg.pub>
component.name: ed25519-dalek
component.description: Fast and efficient ed25519 EdDSA key generations, signing, and verification in pure Rust.

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: ed25519
component.description: Edwards Digital Signature Algorithm (EdDSA) over Curve25519 (as specified in RFC 8032) support library providing signature type definitions and PKCS#8 private key decoding/encoding support

component.name: edge-dhcp
component.description: Async + `no_std` + no-alloc implementation of the DHCP protocol

component.name: edge-nal-embassy
component.description: An implementation of edge-nal based on `embassy-net`

component.name: edge-nal
component.description: Hosts a bunch of traits which are not yet available in the embedded-nal-async crate

component.name: edge-raw
component.description: Async + `no_std` + no-alloc implementation of IP and UDP packet creation and parsing

component.name: embassy-embedded-hal
component.description: Collection of utilities to use `embedded-hal` and `embedded-storage` traits with Embassy.

component.name: embassy-embedded-hal
component.description: Collection of utilities to use `embedded-hal` and `embedded-storage` traits with Embassy.

component.name: embassy-embedded-hal
component.description: Collection of utilities to use `embedded-hal` and `embedded-storage` traits with Embassy.

component.name: embassy-executor-macros
component.description: macros for creating the entry point and tasks for embassy-executor

component.name: embassy-executor-timer-queue
component.description: Timer queue item and interface between embassy-executor and timer queues

component.name: embassy-executor
component.description: async/await executor designed for embedded usage

component.name: embassy-futures
component.description: no-std, no-alloc utilities for working with futures

component.name: embassy-hal-internal
component.description: Internal implementation details for Embassy HALs. DO NOT USE DIRECTLY.

component.name: embassy-net-driver
component.description: Driver trait for the `embassy-net` async TCP/IP network stack.

component.name: embassy-net
component.description: Async TCP/IP network stack for embedded systems

component.name: embassy-sync
component.description: no-std, no-alloc synchronization primitives with async support

component.name: embassy-sync
component.description: no-std, no-alloc synchronization primitives with async support

component.name: embassy-time-driver
component.description: Driver trait for embassy-time

component.name: embassy-time-queue-utils
component.description: Timer queue driver trait for embassy-time

component.name: embassy-time
component.description: Instant and Duration for embedded no-std systems, with async timer support

component.name: embassy-time
component.description: Instant and Duration for embedded no-std systems, with async timer support

component.name: embedded-can
component.description: HAL traits for Controller Area Network (CAN) devices.

component.author: The Embedded HAL Team and Contributors <embedded-hal@teams.rust-embedded.org>
component.name: embedded-hal-async
component.description: An asynchronous Hardware Abstraction Layer (HAL) for embedded systems

component.author: The Embedded HAL Team <embedded-hal@teams.rust-embedded.org>, Jorge Aparicio <jorge@japaric.io>, Jonathan 'theJPster' Pallant <github@thejpster.org.uk>

component.description: A Hardware Abstraction Layer (HAL) for embedded systems

component.name: enumset
component.description: A library for creating compact sets of enums.

component.name: enumset_derive
component.description: An internal helper crate for enumset. Not public API.

component.name: equivalent
component.description: Traits for key comparison in maps.

component.name: esp-alloc
component.description: A heap allocator for Espressif devices

component.name: esp-backtrace
component.description: Bare-metal backtrace support for Espressif devices

component.name: esp-bootloader-esp-idf
component.description: Functionality related to the esp-idf bootloader

component.name: esp-config
component.description: Configure projects using esp-hal and related packages

component.name: esp-hal-procmacros
component.description: Procedural macros for esp-hal

component.name: esp-hal
component.description: Bare-metal HAL for Espressif devices

component.name: esp-metadata-generated
component.description: Generated metadata for Espressif devices

component.name: esp-phy
component.description: PHY initialization

component.name: esp-println
component.description: Provides `print!` and `println!` implementations various Espressif devices

component.name: esp-radio-rtos-driver
component.description: Task scheduler interface for esp-radio

component.name: esp-radio
component.description: A WiFi, Bluetooth and ESP-NOW driver for use with Espressif chips and bare-metal Rust

component.name: esp-rom-sys
component.description: ROM code support

component.name: esp-rtos
component.description: A task scheduler for Espressif devices

component.name: esp-storage
component.description: Implementation of embedded-storage traits to access unencrypted ESP32 flash

component.name: esp-sync
component.description: Synchronization primitives for Espressif devices

component.author: The ESP-RS team
component.name: esp-wifi-sys
component.description: Bindings to Espressif's WiFi and Bluetooth low-level drivers

component.name: esp32
component.description: Peripheral access crate for the ESP32

component.name: esp32c2
component.description: Peripheral access crate for the ESP32-C2

component.name: fnv
component.description: Fowler–Noll–Vo hash function

component.author: Emil Fresk <emil.fresk@gmail.com>
component.name: fugit
component.description: Time library for embedded targets with ease-of-use and performance first.

component.name: futures-core
component.description: The core traits and types in for the `futures` library.

component.name: futures-sink
component.description: The asynchronous `Sink` trait for the futures-rs library.

component.name: futures-task
component.description: Tools for working with tasks.

component.name: futures-util
component.description: Common utilities and extension traits for the futures-rs library.

component.author: Corey Farwell <coreyf@rwell.org>
component.name: gcd
component.description: Calculate the greatest common divisor

component.author: Bartłomiej Kamiński <fizyk20@gmail.com>, Aaron Trent <novacrazy@gmail.com>
component.name: generic-array
component.description: Generic types implementing functionality of arrays

component.author: The Rand Project Developers
component.name: getrandom
component.description: A small cross-platform library for retrieving random data from system source

component.author: Jorge Aparicio <jorge@japaric.io>
component.name: hash32
component.description: 32-bit hashing algorithms

component.author: Amanieu d'Antras <amanieu@gmail.com>
component.name: hashbrown
component.description: A Rust port of Google's SwissTable hash map

component.author: Jorge Aparicio <jorge@japaric.io>, Per Lindgren <per.lindgren@ltu.se>, Emil Fresk <emil.fresk@gmail.com>
component.name: heapless
component.description: `static` friendly data structures that don't require dynamic memory allocation

component.author: Jorge Aparicio <jorge@japaric.io>, Per Lindgren <per.lindgren@ltu.se>, Emil Fresk <emil.fresk@gmail.com>
component.name: heapless
component.description: `static` friendly data structures that don't require dynamic memory allocation

component.name: heck
component.description: heck is a case conversion library.

component.author: KokaKiwi <kokakiwi@kokakiwi.net>
component.name: hex
component.description: Encoding and decoding data into/from hexadecimal representation.

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: hmac
component.description: Generic implementation of Hash-based Message Authentication Code (HMAC)

component.author: Ted Driggs <ted.driggs@outlook.com>
component.name: ident_case
component.description: Utility for applying case rules to Rust identifiers.

component.name: indexmap
component.description: A hash table with consistent order and fast iteration.

component.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: indoc
component.description: Indented document literals

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: inout
component.description: Custom reference types for code generic over in-place and buffer-to-buffer modes of operation.

component.author: Stephen M. Coakley <me@stephencoakley.com>, The Ratatui Developers
component.name: instability
component.description: Rust API stability attributes for the rest of us. A fork of the `stability` crate.

component.name: is_terminal_polyfill
component.description: Polyfill for `is_terminal` stdlib feature for use with older MSRVs

component.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: itoa
component.description: Fast integer primitive to string conversion

component.author: Andrew Gallant <jamslam@gmail.com>
component.name: jiff
component.description: A date-time library that encourages you to jump into the pit of success. This library is heavily inspired by the Temporal project.

component.author: The Rust Project Developers
component.name: libc
component.description: Raw FFI bindings to platform libraries like libc.

component.author: Philipp Oppermann <dev@phil-opp.com>
component.name: linked_list_allocator
component.description: Simple allocator usable for no_std systems. It builds a linked list from the freed blocks and thus needs no additional data structures.

component.author: Lukas Kalbertodt <lukas.kalbertodt@gmail.com>
component.name: litrs
component.description: Parse and inspect Rust literals (i.e. tokens in the Rust programming language representing fixed values). Particularly useful for proc macros, but can also be used outside of a proc-macro context.

component.author: The Rust Project Developers
component.name: log
component.description: A lightweight logging facade for Rust

component.author: whitequark <whitequark@whitequark.org>
component.name: managed
component.description: An interface for logically owning objects, whether or not heap allocation is available.

component.author: Andrew Gallant <jamslam@gmail.com>, bluss
component.name: memchr
component.description: Provides extremely fast (uses SIMD on x86_64, aarch64 and wasm32) routines for 1, 2 or 3 byte search and single substring search.

component.author: Jorge Aparicio <jorge@japaric.io>
component.name: nb
component.description: Minimal non-blocking I/O layer

component.author: Jorge Aparicio <jorge@japaric.io>
component.name: nb
component.description: Minimal non-blocking I/O layer

component.author: The Rust Project Developers
component.name: num-derive
component.description: Numeric syntax extensions

component.author: The Rust Project Developers
component.name: num-traits
component.description: Numeric traits for generic mathematics

component.author: Daniel Wagner-Hall <dawagner@gmail.com>, Daniel Henry-Mantilla <daniel.henry.mantilla@gmail.com>, Vincent Esche <regexident@gmail.com>
component.name: num_enum
component.description: Procedural macros to make inter-operation between primitives and enums easier.

component.author: Daniel Wagner-Hall <dawagner@gmail.com>, Daniel Henry-Mantilla <daniel.henry.mantilla@gmail.com>, Vincent Esche <regexident@gmail.com>
component.name: num_enum_derive
component.description: Internal implementation details for ::num_enum (Procedural macros to make inter-operation between primitives and enums easier)

component.author: Aleksey Kladov <aleksey.kladov@gmail.com>
component.name: once_cell
component.description: Single assignment cells and lazy values.

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: opaque-debug
component.description: Macro for opaque Debug trait implementation

component.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: paste
component.description: Macros for all your token pasting needs

component.author: Aditya Kumar <git@adityais.dev>, David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: pastey
component.description: Macros for all your token pasting needs. Successor of paste.

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: pem-rfc7468
component.description: PEM Encoding (RFC 7468) for PKIX, PKCS, and CMS Structures, implementing a strict subset of the original Privacy-Enhanced Mail encoding intended specifically for use with cryptographic keys, certificates, and other messages. Provides a no_std-friendly, constant-time implementation suitable for use with cryptographic private keys.

component.name: pin-project-lite
component.description: A lightweight version of pin-project written with declarative macros.

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: poly1305
component.description: The Poly1305 universal hash function and message authentication code

component.name: portable-atomic
component.description: Portable atomic types including support for 128-bit atomics, atomic float, etc.

component.author: Thomas Bächler <thomas.baechler@gmx.de>, Dániel Buga <bugadani@gmail.com>
component.name: portable_atomic_enum
component.description: An attribute to create an portable atomic wrapper around a C-style enum

component.author: Thomas Bächler <thomas.baechler@gmx.de>, Dániel Buga <bugadani@gmail.com>
component.name: portable_atomic_enum_macros
component.description: An attribute to create an portable atomic wrapper around a C-style enum

component.author: Andrei Volnin <wolandr@gmail.com>
component.name: pretty-hex
component.description: Pretty hex dump of bytes slice in the common style.

component.author: Bastian Köcher <git@kchr.de>
component.name: proc-macro-crate
component.description: Replacement for crate (macro_rules keyword) in proc-macros

component.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>, Alex Crichton <alex@alexcrichton.com>
component.name: proc-macro2
component.description: A substitute implementation of the compiler's `proc_macro` API to decouple token-based libraries from the procedural macro use case.

component.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: quote
component.description: Quasi-quoting macro quote!(...)

component.author: The Rand Project Developers, The Rust Project Developers
component.name: rand_core
component.description: Core random number generator traits and tools for implementation.

component.author: The Rand Project Developers, The Rust Project Developers
component.name: rand_core
component.description: Core random number generator traits and tools for implementation.

component.author: yvt <i@yvt.jp>
component.name: rlsf
component.description: Real-time dynamic memory allocator based on the TLSF algorithm

component.author: The Rust Project Developers
component.name: rustc-hash
component.description: A speedy, non-cryptographic hashing algorithm used by rustc

component.name: rustc_version
component.description: A library for querying the version of a installed rustc compiler

component.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: rustversion
component.description: Conditional compilation according to rustc compiler version

component.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: ryu
component.description: Fast floating point to string conversion

component.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: semver
component.description: Parser and evaluator for Cargo's flavor of Semantic Versioning

component.author: Erick Tryzelaar <erick.tryzelaar@gmail.com>, David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: serde
component.description: A generic serialization/deserialization framework

component.author: Erick Tryzelaar <erick.tryzelaar@gmail.com>, David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: serde_core
component.description: Serde traits only, with no support for derive -- use the `serde` crate instead

component.author: Erick Tryzelaar <erick.tryzelaar@gmail.com>, David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: serde_derive
component.description: Macros 1.1 implementation of #[derive(Serialize, Deserialize)]

component.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: serde_yaml
component.description: YAML data format for Serde

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: sha2
component.description: Pure Rust implementation of the SHA-2 hash function family including SHA-224, SHA-256, SHA-384, and SHA-512.

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: signature
component.description: Traits for cryptographic signature algorithms (e.g. ECDSA, Ed25519)

component.author: whitequark <whitequark@whitequark.org>
component.name: smoltcp
component.description: A TCP/IP stack designed for bare-metal, real-time systems without a heap.

component.author: Jake Goulding <jake.goulding@gmail.com>
component.name: snafu-derive
component.description: An ergonomic error handling library

component.author: Jake Goulding <jake.goulding@gmail.com>
component.name: snafu
component.description: An ergonomic error handling library

component.name: somni-expr
component.description: An expression evaluation library

component.name: somni-parser
component.description: Grammar parser of the Somni language and VM

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: ssh-cipher
component.description: Pure Rust implementation of SSH symmetric encryption including support for the modern aes128-gcm@openssh.com/aes256-gcm@openssh.com and chacha20-poly1305@openssh.com algorithms as well as legacy support for older ciphers. Built on the pure Rust cryptography implementations maintained by the RustCrypto organization.

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: ssh-encoding
component.description: Pure Rust implementation of SSH data type decoders/encoders as described in RFC4251

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: ssh-key
component.description: Pure Rust implementation of SSH key file format decoders/encoders as described in RFC4251/RFC4253 and OpenSSH key formats, as well as "sshsig" signatures and certificates (including certificate validation and certificate authority support), with further support for the `authorized_keys` and `known_hosts` file formats.

component.author: Robert Grosse <n210241048576@gmail.com>
component.name: stable_deref_trait
component.description: An unsafe marker trait for types like Box and Rc that dereference to a stable address even when moved, and hence can be used with libraries such as owning_ref and rental.

component.name: static_cell
component.description: Statically allocated, initialized at runtime cell.

component.author: Danny Guo <danny@dannyguo.com>, maxbachmann <oss@maxbachmann.de>
component.name: strsim
component.description: Implementations of string similarity metrics. Includes Hamming, Levenshtein, OSA, Damerau-Levenshtein, Jaro, Jaro-Winkler, and Sørensen-Dice.

component.author: Peter Glotfelty <peter.glotfelty@microsoft.com>
component.name: strum
component.description: Helpful macros for working with enums and strings

component.author: Peter Glotfelty <peter.glotfelty@microsoft.com>
component.name: strum_macros
component.description: Helpful macros for working with enums and strings

component.author: Isis Lovecruft <isis@patternsinthevoid.net>, Henry de Valence <hdevalence@hdevalence.ca>
component.name: subtle
component.description: Pure-Rust traits and utilities for constant-time cryptographic implementations.

component.author: yvt <i@yvt.jp>
component.name: svgbobdoc
component.description: Renders ASCII diagrams in doc comments as SVG images.

component.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: syn
component.description: Parser for Rust source code

component.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: syn
component.description: Parser for Rust source code

component.author: Andrew Gallant <jamslam@gmail.com>
component.name: termcolor
component.description: A simple cross platform library for writing colored text to a terminal.

component.name: toml_datetime
component.description: A TOML-compatible datetime type

component.name: toml_edit
component.description: Yet another format-preserving TOML parser.

component.name: toml_parser
component.description: Yet another format-preserving TOML parser.

component.author: Paho Lurie-Gregg <paho@paholg.com>, Andre Bogus <bogusandre@gmail.com>
component.name: typenum
component.description: Typenum is a Rust library for type-level numbers evaluated at compile time. It currently supports bits, unsigned integers, and signed integers. It also provides a type-level array of type-level numbers, but its implementation is incomplete.

component.author: Jorge Aparicio <jorge@japaric.io>
component.name: ufmt-write
component.description: `μfmt`'s `uWrite` trait

component.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: unicode-ident
component.description: Determine whether characters have the XID_Start or XID_Continue properties according to Unicode Standard Annex #31

component.author: kwantam <kwantam@gmail.com>, Manish Goregaokar <manishsmail@gmail.com>
component.name: unicode-width
component.description: Determine displayed width of `char` and `str` types according to Unicode Standard Annex #11 rules.

component.author: RustCrypto Developers
component.name: universal-hash
component.description: Traits which describe the functionality of universal hash functions (UHFs)

component.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
component.name: unsafe-libyaml
component.description: libyaml transpiled to rust by c2rust

component.author: Joe Wilm <joe@jwilm.com>, Christian Duerr <contact@christianduerr.com>
component.name: utf8parse
component.description: Table-driven UTF-8 parser

component.author: Jorge Aparicio <japaricious@gmail.com>
component.name: vcell
component.description: `Cell` with volatile read / write operations

component.author: Sergio Benitez <sb@sergio.bz>
component.name: version_check
component.description: Tiny crate to check the version of the installed/running rustc.

component.name: virtue
component.description: A sinless derive macro helper

component.author: Jonathan Reem <jonathan.reem@gmail.com>
component.name: void
component.description: The uninhabited void type for use in statically impossible cases.

component.name: winnow
component.description: A byte-oriented, zero-copy, parser combinators library

component.author: Isis Lovecruft <isis@patternsinthevoid.net>, DebugSteven <debugsteven@gmail.com>, Henry de Valence <hdevalence@hdevalence.ca>
component.name: x25519-dalek
component.description: X25519 elliptic curve Diffie-Hellman key exchange in pure-Rust, using curve25519-dalek.

component.author: The RustCrypto Project Developers
component.name: zeroize
component.description: Securely clear secrets from memory with a simple trait built on stable Rust primitives which guarantee memory is zeroed using an operation will not be 'optimized away' by the compiler. Uses a portable pure Rust implementation that works everywhere, even WASM!

component.author: The RustCrypto Project Developers
component.name: zeroize_derive
component.description: Custom derive support for zeroize
